scripts.test:backend: PYTHONPATH=src:. uv run --group dev pytest tests/test_background_jobs.py tests/test_phase1_runtime_seams.py tests/test_phase2_graph_scaffolds.py tests/test_phase3_graph_planner_retrieval.py tests/test_ui_server_http_smokes.py -q
scripts.test:health:fast: npm run frontend:build && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:health: npm run test:health:fast && npm run test:e2e
